expectations.text: Claude reads package.json and source files before asking any question
expectations.evidence: Response starts with 'I've looked through the project' and lists stack, architecture, data model details that could only come from reading source files

expectations.text: Claude presents a KNOWN list of 3-5 things it inferred from the codebase
expectations.evidence: 6 bullet points: Stack, Project name, Architecture, Data model, AGENTS.md status, Tests

expectations.text: Claude correctly identifies Next.js, Supabase, TypeScript, and Vitest
expectations.evidence: First bullet: 'Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript + Supabase + Zod, with Vitest for testing'

expectations.text: First question is about the product/what the project does, not about technical setup
expectations.evidence: First question: 'What problem does this app solve, and who are its users?'

expectations.text: Questions include concrete options (not open-ended) and a recommendation
expectations.evidence: 3 options (A: Personal, B: Multi-user SaaS, C: Team) with recommendation for B based on user_id field

expectations.text: Claude asks exactly one question per message, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Only one question asked, with three options
